rules.summary: Runtime resource rows must launch saved or inferred web-interface URLs through the shared name-link template, not a page-local link or separate web column.
Platform, workload, and infrastructure inline detail rows must compose the shared row/cell/content shell instead of recreating page-local surface-alt drawer rows.

Inline platform detail content must compose DetailSectionTable or InlineDetailPanel for shared detail rows, value tones, section tables, and close actions instead of recreating local field grids or provider-named detail primitives.
Product table surfaces must compose TableCard for the shared card frame instead of recreating local overflow-hidden bordered table wrappers.
Table-card headers must compose TableCardHeader for title/action/clear chrome instead of recreating local summary-table header aliases.
Resource and health indicator dots must compose StatusDot for shared size, variant, pulse, title, and aria behavior instead of recreating local rounded status spans.

Standard command buttons and button-styled route actions must compose Button or ButtonLink for shared variants, sizes, focus, disabled, loading, and safe-link behavior instead of recreating local Tailwind button shells.

patterns: inline-flex items-center rounded-md border border-border bg-surface px-3 py-2 text-xs font-medium text-base-content transition hover:bg-surface-hover
w-full sm:w-auto px-3 py-1.5 text-xs font-medium rounded-md border border-border bg-surface hover:bg-surface-hover disabled:opacity-50
w-full sm:w-auto min-h-10 sm:min-h-9 flex items-center justify-center gap-1.5 px-3 py-2.5 text-sm rounded-md border border-border
rounded-md border border-base-300 bg-base-100 px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-base-content
flex w-full items-center justify-center gap-2 rounded-md px-6 py-3 font-semibold transition-all sm:w-auto
inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-md bg-emerald-600 px-3 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-white transition-colors hover:bg-emerald-700
inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-md border border-emerald-300 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-emerald-900 transition-colors hover:bg-emerald-100
inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-md border border-emerald-300 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-emerald-900 hover:bg-emerald-100
inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-md px-3 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-emerald-900 hover:bg-emerald-100

rules.summary: Copy-value icon and chip controls must compose CopyValueButton for shared copied-state iconography, disabled handling, focus, sizing, and aria behavior instead of recreating page-local copy buttons.
Copyable code/value rows must compose CopyableCodeRow for the shared code surface and copy action instead of recreating local font-mono row shells.

patterns: flex items-start gap-2 rounded bg-surface-alt px-2 py-1.5

rules.summary: Native select controls must compose FormSelect for shared label/id/help wiring, value synchronization, and select chrome instead of recreating labelled select wrappers locally.
Native textarea controls must compose FormTextarea for shared label/id/help wiring, value synchronization, and textarea chrome instead of recreating labelled textarea wrappers locally.

Binary on/off controls must compose Toggle or TogglePrimitive for shared track/knob styling, disabled behavior, label/description wiring, and synthetic checked events instead of recreating local switch buttons.

Read-only health/state badges must compose StatusIndicatorBadge for shared status-to-tone mapping, sizing, dot wiring, and label presentation instead of recreating local badge spans with getStatusIndicatorBadgeToneClasses.
Platform page and table loading states must compose PlatformTableLoadingState instead of recreating local TableCard status rows.
Platform page and table load failures must compose PlatformErrorState instead of recreating a local EmptyState plus Refresh action.
Platform page workflow tabs must compose PlatformSectionTabs instead of recreating page-local nav tab bars.
Resource-list filter surfaces must compose the shared FilterBar catalog shell instead of recreating page-local filter rows or legacy PageControls decks.
Product surfaces with simple search fields must compose SearchField for the shared icon, clear button, keyboard, focus, aria, and input chrome instead of rendering native search inputs.
Resource-list and drawer search boxes that need history, tips, or type-to-search behavior must compose SearchInput instead of rebuilding search-enhancement controls locally.
Settings and compact feature segmented selectors must compose FilterButtonGroup instead of recreating active-button group styling locally.

patterns: min-h-10 sm:min-h-9 min-w-10 px-3 py-2 rounded-md text-sm font-medium transition-all

rules.summary: Summary-bearing filter surfaces must compose ChartVisibilityToggleButton for chart show/hide display actions instead of recreating one-off chart toggle buttons.
Table column visibility controls must compose ColumnPicker instead of recreating column chooser trigger, panel, reset, or hidden-count chrome locally.
Selectable settings card groups must compose SelectionCardGroup instead of recreating compact/detail active-card styling and disabled selection behavior locally.
Grouped/list table-mode controls must compose GroupedTableModeSegmentedControl instead of recreating grouped/list labels, titles, or icons locally.

patternGuards.summary: Platform tables must compose the shared PlatformTableShell frame instead of recreating the TableCard/TableHeader/TableBody shell locally.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Platform table frames must use PlatformTableShell; no local-frame exceptions are currently allowed.

patternGuards.summary: Platform feature tables must compose PlatformTableEmptyState for their table/card empty-state shell instead of importing EmptyState directly.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Platform table empty states must use PlatformTableEmptyState; no platform feature exceptions are currently allowed.

patternGuards.summary: Product table surfaces must not copy the retired local bordered overflow-hidden table wrapper owned by TableCard.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Product table frames must use TableCard; local bordered overflow-hidden table wrappers are not allowed.

patternGuards.summary: Product table surfaces must not reintroduce the retired SummaryTableCardHeader local alias.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Table-card title/action/clear chrome must use TableCardHeader; no local header aliases are allowed.

patternGuards.summary: Platform feature loading states must compose PlatformTableLoadingState instead of recreating the compact TableCard status row locally.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Platform table loading states must use PlatformTableLoadingState; no compact local status-row exceptions are currently allowed.

patternGuards.summary: Platform page surfaces must not recreate the active-link tab navigation owned by PlatformSectionTabs.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Platform page section tabs must use PlatformSectionTabs; no page-local tab-bar exceptions are currently allowed.

patternGuards.summary: Summary-bearing surfaces must not copy the Show charts / Hide charts display-toggle labels owned by ChartVisibilityToggleButton.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Chart visibility display actions must use ChartVisibilityToggleButton; local show/hide chart toggle copies are not allowed.

patternGuards.summary: Table surfaces must not copy the column chooser title and panel copy owned by ColumnPicker.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Table column visibility controls must use ColumnPicker; local column chooser copies are not allowed.

patternGuards.summary: Settings and feature surfaces must not copy the compact/detail active-card styling owned by SelectionCardGroup.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Selectable settings card groups must use SelectionCardGroup; local compact/detail active-card styling forks are not allowed.

patternGuards.summary: Resource surfaces must not copy the grouped/list table-mode segmented-control labels owned by GroupedTableModeSegmentedControl.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Grouped/list table-mode controls must use GroupedTableModeSegmentedControl; no local label/title copies are currently allowed.

patternGuards.summary: Page and feature filter surfaces must not import the legacy PageControls deck when they should be expressed as a FilterBar catalog.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Resource-list filter surfaces must compose FilterBar; no page-level filter exceptions are currently allowed.

patternGuards.summary: Product surfaces must not render native type=search inputs; they must compose SearchField or SearchInput so search chrome, clear behavior, keyboard handling, and aria labels stay canonical.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Search controls must use SearchField or SearchInput; native search inputs are not allowed in product surfaces.

patternGuards.summary: Storage linked-disk health rows must not recreate the retired green/yellow raw dot classes owned by StatusDot.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Linked-disk health indicators must use StatusDot variants instead of local green/yellow dot classes.

patternGuards.summary: Product components must compose StatusIndicatorBadge instead of calling getStatusIndicatorBadgeToneClasses directly for read-only health/state badges.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Read-only status badges must route through StatusIndicatorBadge; status utilities may still expose tone classes for the shared primitive and non-component tests.

patternGuards.summary: Product and shared filter components must compose FormSelect instead of recreating labelled native select shells locally.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Native select controls must use FormSelect for label/id/select chrome wiring and dynamic option value synchronization.

patternGuards.summary: Alert destination and incident timeline textareas must compose FormTextarea; only the resource note editors remain as bounded residuals until their editor-specific migration.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Bounded residual. Alert resource note editors still own row/mobile-specific editing behavior; new alert textareas must use FormTextarea.

patternGuards.summary: Settings textareas must compose FormTextarea; the SSO provider editor remains as bounded residual until its multi-field provider metadata editor is migrated.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Bounded residual. SSO provider metadata textareas still require a dedicated editor migration; new settings textareas must use FormTextarea.

patternGuards.summary: Infrastructure modal textareas must compose FormTextarea instead of recreating labelled native textarea wrappers locally.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Infrastructure form textareas must use FormTextarea for label/id/help wiring.

patternGuards.summary: Binary switch-looking controls must compose Toggle or TogglePrimitive instead of hand-rolling local role=switch buttons with aria-checked and custom track/knob classes.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Local switch role buttons must route through the shared Toggle primitive; radios, checkboxes, and selection controls are governed separately.

patternGuards.summary: Filter option status-dot leading icons must use the FilterBar presentation helper instead of page-local span factories.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Filter chip leading-dot presentation is owned by the FilterBar primitive family.

patternGuards.summary: Settings and feature surfaces must not copy the compact active-button segmented-control styling owned by FilterButtonGroup.
allPatterns: flex items-center bg-base rounded-md p-1 border shadow-inner
flex-1 py-1.5 px-2 text-xs font-semibold rounded-md transition-all duration-200
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Settings and compact feature segmented selectors must use FilterButtonGroup; local active-button selector styling forks are not allowed.

patternGuards.summary: Product surfaces must not copy the standard secondary command-button shell; use Button for buttons and ButtonLink for route/link actions.
allPatterns: rounded-md border border-border bg-surface px-3 py-1.5 text-xs font-medium text-base-content
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Standard secondary command buttons belong to the shared Button primitive family, including button-styled links.

patternGuards.summary: Command-copy controls must not recreate the absolute top-right icon-button shell; use CommandCopyButton from the shared Button primitive family.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Command-copy icon buttons belong to CommandCopyButton so position, sizing, icon, focus, disabled, and aria behavior stay canonical.

patternGuards.summary: Copy-value controls must not copy the neutral bordered icon-button shell; use CopyValueButton with the neutral variant.
allPatterns: inline-flex min-h-7 min-w-7 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded border border-border bg-surface px-2 text-muted transition-colors hover:bg-surface-hover hover:text-base-content
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Neutral copy-value icon buttons belong to CopyValueButton.

patternGuards.summary: Copy-value controls must not copy the muted icon-button shell; use CopyValueButton with the ghost variant.
allPatterns: inline-flex min-h-8 min-w-8 items-center justify-center rounded-md text-muted transition-colors hover:bg-surface-hover hover:text-base-content
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Muted copy-value icon buttons belong to CopyValueButton.

patternGuards.summary: Copy-value controls must not copy the blue suggested-value icon-button shell; use CopyValueButton with the accent variant.
allPatterns: inline-flex min-h-7 min-w-7 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded text-blue-700 transition-colors hover:bg-blue-100 dark:text-blue-200 dark:hover:bg-blue-950
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Accent copy-value icon buttons belong to CopyValueButton.

patternGuards.summary: Copyable code/value rows must not copy the local surface-alt font-mono row shell; use CopyableCodeRow.
allPatterns: flex items-start gap-2 rounded bg-surface-alt px-2 py-1.5
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Copyable code rows belong to CopyableCodeRow so code styling and copy behavior stay canonical.

patternGuards.summary: Inline platform detail content must not recreate local DetailField grids; use DetailSectionTable or InlineDetailPanel.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Inline detail field grids belong to DetailSectionTable / InlineDetailPanel so detail sections, value tones, truncation, and close actions stay canonical.

patternGuards.summary: Platform-neutral detail section tables must not import the retired provider-named TrueNAS detail primitive.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Provider-specific names must not own platform-neutral detail tables; use DetailSectionTable / detailSectionModel.

patternGuards.summary: Settings and hosted-admin surfaces must not copy compact xs action-button shells; use Button with the settingsActionXs or sm size.
allPatterns: rounded-md border border-border bg-surface px-3 py-2 text-xs font-medium text-base-content
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Compact settings and admin actions belong to the shared Button primitive family.

patternGuards.summary: Settings and infrastructure surfaces must not copy the standard secondary px-3 py-2 action-button shell; use Button or ButtonLink with the mdCompact size.
allPatterns: rounded-md border border-border bg-surface px-3 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-base-content
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Standard settings-sized secondary command buttons belong to the shared Button primitive family.

patternGuards.summary: Settings and infrastructure surfaces must not copy the bordered px-3 py-2 action-button shell; use Button or ButtonLink with the outline variant and settingsAction size.
allPatterns: rounded-md border border-border px-3 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-base-content
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Standard bordered settings actions belong to the shared Button primitive family.

patternGuards.summary: Settings and infrastructure surfaces must not copy the blue px-3 py-2 primary action-button shell; use Button with the primary variant and settingsAction size.
allPatterns: rounded-md bg-blue-600 px-3 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-white
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Primary settings actions belong to the shared Button primitive family.

patternGuards.summary: Settings and infrastructure surfaces must not copy the emerald px-3 py-2 success action-button shell; use Button with the success variant and mdCompact or settingsAction size.
allPatterns: rounded-md bg-emerald-600 px-3 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-white
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Positive settings actions belong to the shared Button primitive family.

patternGuards.summary: Settings and infrastructure surfaces must not copy the emerald outlined px-3 py-2 success action-button shell; use Button with the successOutline variant and mdCompact or settingsAction size.
allPatterns: rounded-md border border-emerald-300 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-emerald-900
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Positive outlined settings actions belong to the shared Button primitive family.

patternGuards.summary: Settings and infrastructure surfaces must not copy the emerald ghost px-3 py-2 success action-button shell; use Button with the successGhost variant and mdCompact or settingsAction size.
allPatterns: rounded-md px-3 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-emerald-900
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Positive ghost settings actions belong to the shared Button primitive family.

patternGuards.summary: Reporting and similar settings CTA rows must not copy the large full-width action-button shell; use Button with the lg size and contextual variant.
allPatterns: flex w-full items-center justify-center gap-2 rounded-md px-6 py-3 font-semibold transition-all sm:w-auto
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Large settings/report actions belong to the shared Button primitive family.

patternGuards.summary: Settings and infrastructure surfaces must not copy the rose px-3 py-2 destructive action-button shell; use Button with the danger variant and settingsAction size.
allPatterns: rounded-md bg-rose-600 px-3 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-white
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Confirmed destructive settings actions belong to the shared Button primitive family.

patternGuards.summary: Settings and infrastructure surfaces must not copy the rose outlined px-3 py-2 destructive action-button shell; use Button with the dangerOutline variant and settingsAction size.
allPatterns: rounded-md border border-rose-300 px-3 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-rose-700
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Unconfirmed destructive settings actions belong to the shared Button primitive family.

patternGuards.summary: Settings row and inline actions must not copy the compact bordered px-2.5 py-1 action shell; use Button or ButtonLink with the outline variant and xs size.
allPatterns: rounded-md border border-border px-2.5 py-1 text-xs font-medium text-base-content
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Compact settings row actions belong to the shared Button primitive family.

patternGuards.summary: Settings dialog close buttons must not copy the h-9 w-9 bordered icon shell; use Button with the outline variant and iconMd size.
allPatterns: h-9 w-9 items-center justify-center rounded-md border border-border text-base-content transition-colors hover:bg-surface-hover
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Settings dialog close buttons belong to the shared Button primitive family.

requiredPatternGuards.summary: Platform rows using shared resource-detail expansion state must render the canonical disclosure toggle instead of relying on row-only click behavior or local chevrons.
Platform tables that render page-local inline detail rows must compose the canonical disclosure toggle in the owning row.
Files that render inline/detail table rows in platform, workload, or infrastructure surfaces must use InlineDetailTableRow for the shared row/cell/content shell.
Platform feature files that surface load-failure copy must compose PlatformErrorState for the canonical retry shell.
Named platform detail rows such as Docker network detail rows must use InlineDetailTableRow even when their row attribute is not data-inline-*.
